action: Read the medical record submitted by the user.
fallback_action: If reading the medical record fails (e.g., cannot access file), ask the user to paste the content as text or escalate the issue to technical support.

recipe.steps: Request the user to provide or upload the medical record (CBC report).
If file upload fails or is not accessible due to a system issue, inform the user and request the report content as plain text or escalate the issue to technical support.
Once the medical record is received as plain text, extract all key patient and test information from the provided content.
Save the extracted CBC record and patient metadata into the assistant's memory using a structured key.

can_perform_without_user_input: no - user must provide the medical record content either as file or text.
